narrative: Strait of Hormuz security risks and Middle East escalation drive a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY firms to 162.68 as the 275bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets marginal risk-premium flows; gold higher +1.23% near $4,065; equities -0.19%; DXY steady -0.01%; VIX 17.5. NZD/USD bids to 0.5860 as hot CPI data bolsters RBNZ hike bets against a -0.58% real rate. Watch ECB Rate Decision 12:15 UTC Thursday.
